'''Zayna Tredahl''' was a native of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="g">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>

Zayna was the mother of the [[Holocamera/Legends|holocam]] operator [[Kafleer Tredahl]], and was briefly kidnapped by terrorists.<ref name="g" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateCommoner.png|thumb|right|250px|Every possible depiction of Zayna Tredahl]]
Zayna Tredahl was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]]. The game was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Due to the nature of many older [[:w:c:swg:Quest|quests]] in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the [[Species/Legends|species]], [[Gender/Legends|gender]], and appearance of Zayna Tredahl changed each time a player performed this quest. However, the quest dialogue given by [[Chertyl Ruluwoor (Human)|Chertyle Ruluwoor]] indicated that Zayna Tredahl was a [[Gender/Legends|female]].
